commit_scope: Breath-3 keystone: the field identity VERDICT recipe (fiv-verdict over crypto results -> TRUSTED / FIRST_USE_PIN / UNVERIFIED / REJECT_PIN_CONFLICT / REJECT_NODEID_MISMATCH / REJECT_DELEGATION, plus accept?/should-pin?/impersonation?). Decision is Form (four-way + native); cryptography (ed25519, sha256 NodeID-derivation) and the pin store are carriers fed in as inputs. Identity at the edge; the relay stays open + content-blind.

local_validation.fourth_arm: field-identity band crosses four-way (Go/Rust/TS/fkwu) at verdict 511, 0 divergent; registered in form/fourth-arm-bands.txt as 'field-identity fkc 511'.
local_validation.native_binary: validate.sh --binary -> 511, 0 divergent (kernels agree on every binary artifact).
local_validation.notes: Pure structural decision recipe; no host-io, node/substrate, or multi-line ops -- fully four-way friendly.

ci_validation.notes: PR pending at evidence-write time; the four-way + native proof is the local gate. CI windows-floor/validate-thread-process to confirm.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy required for a stdlib recipe + band; it becomes load-bearing when the breath-3 carrier (ed25519/pin store) and breath-4 client integration land.

phase_gate.gate: Deliver the identity verdict as a four-way + native decision body so the field can tell people apart at the edge. The crypto carrier (ed25519, sha256 NodeID-derivation), the TOFU pin store, and client integration are named follow-ups (this spec's R2-R5).

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A recipient can compute a trust verdict over a presented sender identity: TRUSTED / FIRST_USE_PIN / UNVERIFIED / REJECT_PIN_CONFLICT / REJECT_NODEID_MISMATCH / REJECT_DELEGATION. This is the decision body only; end-to-end trust (a real signed envelope rejected as impersonation, accepted+pinned on first use) becomes observable once the ed25519 carrier + pin store (R3/R4) and client integration (R5, breath 4) land.
test_flows: form/form-stdlib/tests/field-identity-band.fk asserts all six verdicts + accept?/should-pin?/impersonation? -> 511 four-way + native binary, 0 divergent.
e2e_validation.summary: Decision body proven (511 four-way + native). True end-to-end identity flow is pending its carriers (crypto + pin store + client); status pending and honestly scoped, not claimed.
